title: TabMind Popup State
description: Canonical normalized state shape rendered by the TabMind popup UI.

distractionScore.description: Current distraction score computed by the extension core.

focusLabel.description: Focus state derived from the distraction score.

inferredGoal.description: Popup-facing goal string normalized from backend or background output.

shieldModeActive.description: Whether Shield Mode is currently active.

questTitle.description: Single focused task for the user to complete next.

questDescription.description: Short explanation of the current quest.

missions.description: Ordered checklist items shown in the popup.

rationale.description: Why this quest was selected for the current tab context.

lastNotificationAt.description: Timestamp in milliseconds for the last focus nudge.

text.description: Concrete mission text the user can act on immediately.

done.description: Whether the mission is marked complete in the popup.
